case_title: SAN FRANCISCO COMERCIAL CLUB VS ATKINS RICHARD L.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-27-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF FEB-24-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
